landing.heroBody: Tiny tasks. Gentle nudges. Confetti when you finish. FocusFlow is your dopamine-friendly companion for staying focused without the shame spiral.
landing.blobBody: I'll cheer you on through tiny wins and gentle resets. We're in this together.
landing.waitlistTitle: Be the first to know when Pro launches 🚀
landing.waitlistBody: Get early access, founder pricing, and a soft heads-up — no spam, just one warm email.
landing.waitlistSuccess: You're on the list! We'll reach out soon 💛
landing.footer: Made with care for neurodivergent brains.

auth.loginHint: Glad you're here. Let's keep going.
auth.name: Your name

dashboard.buddyQuote: You don't need motivation. Tiny steps. We've got this.
dashboard.overwhelmButton: Everything feels too much right now
dashboard.proBannerBody: Unlimited sessions, AI breakdown, all sounds — unlocked.

tasks.title: Brain dump
tasks.subtitle: Pour everything out. We'll make it small.

bodyDouble.title: Body doubling rooms
bodyDouble.subtitle: No video, no chat — just quiet company. Drop in, get cozy, focus together.
bodyDouble.silentCompanions: silent companions • no chat, no video

progress.subtitle: Look how far you've come — gently and with care.

settings.subtitle: Make this app feel like yours.
settings.languageDesc: Choose the language for the whole app.

onboarding.step1Sub: Pick anything that fits. We'll keep this gentle.
onboarding.step2Title: How long should a focus sprint be?
onboarding.step2Sub: You can change this later, no pressure.
onboarding.step3Sub: Your tiny companion that cheers you on.
onboarding.step4Sub: Soft reminders, never alarms. You can turn this off any time.
onboarding.step5Title: What's one tiny thing on your mind?
onboarding.step5Sub: Anything. We'll add it as your first task. Quick win unlocked.

pricing.title: Simple, kind pricing
pricing.subtitle: No dark patterns, no aggressive upsells. Just honest tools that respect your brain.
pricing.stripeNote: Stripe test mode — no real charges. Cancel anytime.

overwhelm.button: Everything feels too much right now
overwhelm.message: You don't have to do everything. Just this one thing — or nothing at all. You're doing great by being here.

morning.title: Good morning, {{name}}

coaches.title: ADHD Coaches
coaches.subtitle: Real humans who get it. Book a session that fits your brain.
coaches.applySubtitle: Join our marketplace. $29/month listing fee — cancel any time.

planner.title: Weekly planner
planner.subtitle: Drag tasks to days. Max 3 per day — your brain will thank you.
